name: add-lang
tagline: End-to-end workflow to wire, test, and benchmark a new tree-sitter language in codegraph, without committing.
verdict: Detailed, highly actionable workflow with explicit STOP conditions on unhealthy grammars or failed verification, and an explicit no-commit house rule. Minor issues: an unpinned npm package fetch, a possible duplicate corpus.json entry on re-run for already-supported languages, and no out-of-scope guidance or versioning signal.

highlights.summary: `npm pack @tree-sitter-grammars/tree-sitter-<lang>` fetches unpinned latest from a scoped org; well-known publisher softens fail to warning.
No 'NOT for' or exclusion guidance despite a long multi-step workflow.
Step 7 re-adds a corpus.json language block with no check for an existing entry if re-run on an already-supported language.
